ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No calendar available
ast.target: 无可用日历

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Thanks for downloading Full Calendar! Create a calendar below to begin.
ast.target: 感谢下载 Full Calendar！请在下方创建一个日历以开始使用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't call %s on a component that is not yet mounted. This is a no-op, but it might indicate a bug in your application. Instead, assign to `this.state` directly or define a `state = {};` class property with the desired state in the %s component.
ast.target: 无法在尚未挂载的组件上调用 %s。这是一个空操作，但它可能表明您的应用程序中存在错误。相反，请直接赋值给 `this.state` 或在 %s 组件中定义一个包含所需状态的 `state = {};` 类属性。

ast.name: error

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: `key` is not a prop. Trying to access it will result in `undefined` being returned. If you need to access the same value within the child component, you should pass it as a different prop. (https://reactjs.org/link/special-props)
ast.target: %s: `key` 不是 prop。尝试访问它将返回 `undefined`。如果您需要在子组件中访问相同的值，应将其作为不同的 prop 传递。(https://reactjs.org/link/special-props)

error

ast.name: error
ast.source: You provided a `value` prop to a form field without an `onChange` handler. This will render a read-only field. If the field should be mutable use `defaultValue`. Otherwise, set either `onChange` or `readOnly`.

ast.name: error
ast.source: You provided a `checked` prop to a form field without an `onChange` handler. This will render a read-only field. If the field should be mutable use `defaultChecked`. Otherwise, set either `onChange` or `readOnly`.

ast.name: error

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Received `%s` for a non-boolean attribute `%s`.

If you want to write it to the DOM, pass a string instead: %s="%s" or %s={value.toString()}.

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Received `%s` for a non-boolean attribute `%s`.

If you want to write it to the DOM, pass a string instead: %s="%s" or %s={value.toString()}.

If you used to conditionally omit it with %s={condition && value}, pass %s={condition ? value : undefined} instead.
ast.target:
为非布尔属性 `%s` 收到了 `%s`。

如果您想将其写入 DOM，请改为传递一个字符串：%s="%s" 或 %s={value.toString()}。

如果您过去使用 %s={condition && value} 来有条件地省略它，请改为传递 %s={condition ? value : undefined}。

ast.name: error

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Using UNSAFE_componentWillUpdate in strict mode is not recommended and may indicate bugs in your code. See https://reactjs.org/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles for details.

* Move data fetching code or side effects to componentDidUpdate.

Please update the following components: %s
ast.target:
在严格模式下不建议使用 UNSAFE_componentWillUpdate，这可能表明您的代码中存在错误。详情请参阅 https://reactjs.org/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles。

* 请将数据获取代码或副作用移至 componentDidUpdate。

请更新以下组件：%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected to find a StrictMode component in a strict mode tree. This error is likely caused by a bug in React. Please file an issue.

ast.name: error
ast.source:

The old API will be supported in all 16.x releases, but applications using it should migrate to the new version.

Please update the following components: %s

Learn more about this warning here: https://reactjs.org/link/legacy-context

在严格模式树中检测到旧版上下文 API。

旧版 API 将在所有 16.x 版本中得到支持，但使用它的应用程序应迁移到新版本。

ast.target: 在严格模式树中发现了一个字符串 ref \"%s\"。字符串 ref 是潜在错误的来源，应避免使用。我们建议改用 useRef() 或 createRef()。在此处了解更多关于安全使用 ref 的信息：https://reactjs.org/link/strict-mode-string-ref

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

在并发或同步模式下，需要模拟 "scheduler" 模块以确保测试和浏览器间行为一致。例如，使用 jest：
